case_title: ROMERO, ALVARO J. VS ARTHUR MCLAUGHLIN & ASSOCIATES et al

docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL SENT TO JAMES WILLIAM WOODS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ROMERO, ALVARO J. AS TO DEFENDANT ARTHUR MCLAUGHLIN & ASSOCIATES WOODS, JAMES WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2005 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-05-2005, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO DEC-06-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 THE TIME SET FOR THE TRIAL IS NOT CONVENIENT, I HAVE AN APPOINTMENT THAT DAY & WILL NOT BE AVAIL ABLE.
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO JAMES WILLIAM WOODS OF NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ARTHUR MCLAUGHLIN & ASSOCIATES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROMERO, ALVARO J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARTHUR MCLAUGHLIN & ASSOCIATES WOODS, JAMES WILLIAM $1,016.56 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,038.56, PLAINTIFF DISMISSED AGAINST DEFENDANT - WOODS, JAMES DUE TO NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF'S AUTOMOBILE HAS BRANDED TITLE IN THAT THE VEHICLE WAS LISTED WITH THE CALIFORNIA VEHICLE DEPARTMENT AS SALVAGED, WHICH AFFECT THE VALUE OF THE VEHICLE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
